---
title: "Exploratory Data Analysis"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(forecast)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE
)
```

```{r}
tfr <- read_csv("../data/clean_data/tfr_train.csv")
tlb <- read_csv("../data/clean_data/tlb_train.csv")

dir.create("../outputs/plots", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

glimpse(tfr)
glimpse(tlb)
```

## Total Fertility Rate
```{r}
tfr_plot <- ggplot(tfr, aes(x = year, y = TFR)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 1.5, color = "blue") +
  labs(
    title = "Total Fertility Rate (1960–2012)",
    x = "Year",
    y = "TFR"
  )

tfr_plot
ggsave("../outputs/plots/tfr_trend.png", plot = tfr_plot, width = 6, height = 4)
```

## Total Live Births
```{r}
tlb_plot <- ggplot(tlb, aes(x = year, y = TLB)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 1.5, color = "blue") +
  labs(
    title = "Total Live Births (1960–2012)",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Number of Births"
  )

tlb_plot
ggsave("../outputs/plots/tlb_trend.png", plot = tlb_plot, width = 6, height = 4)
```

## Check and print any missing values
```{r}
tfr_missing <- sum(is.na(tfr$TFR))
tlb_missing <- sum(is.na(tlb$TLB))

cat("Missing values in TFR:", tfr_missing, "\n")
cat("Missing values in TLB:", tlb_missing, "\n")
```

## Time series conversion (forecasting)
```{r}
tfr_ts <- ts(tfr$TFR, start = min(tfr$year), frequency = 1)
tlb_ts <- ts(tlb$TLB, start = min(tlb$year), frequency = 1)
```

## Time series plotting
```{r}
plot(tfr_ts, main = "TFR Time Series (1960–2012)")
plot(tlb_ts, main = "TLB Time Series (1960–2012)")
```
